ablate_L0.note: CATASTROPHIC — model broken, no positive labels, AUROC undefined

ablate_L2.note: CLEAN RESULT — accuracy preserved (61%), L6 signal GONE

ablate_L3.note: Moderate drop — L3 contributes but not critical

ablate_L4.note: CLEAN RESULT — accuracy preserved (59%), L6 signal GONE. Refutes N=30 'L4 is the writer' — multiple layers contribute

preliminary_interpretation: At N=150, the L6 probe signal depends on DISTRIBUTED computation across L0-L5, not a single 'writer' layer. L2 ablation kills L6 signal (AUROC 0.50) while preserving accuracy (61%). L4 ablation also kills signal (0.54). Both are 'writers'. The N=30 'L4 is the specific writer' story is REFUTED at proper statistical power. L5 effect (enhancement) is still unknown — re-run needed.
